identity.name: VS Fashion
identity.target_audience: Fashion-conscious women seeking premium ethnic and western wear
design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Blend traditional ethnic richness with modern minimalist layouts.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel 'expensive' and 'curated'.
Content is King: High-quality imagery takes precedence over UI elements.
Negative Space: Use generous padding (2x-3x standard) to create luxury breathing room.

secondary_font.name: Lato
secondary_font.usage: Body text, Buttons, Navigation, Product Details

rules: Headings (Playfair): Use for all text > 24px. Letter-spacing: -0.02em.
Body (Lato): Use for all text < 20px. Line-height: 1.6 (relaxed).
Nav Links: Uppercase, tracking-widest (2px letter spacing), font-size 12px.

usage_rules: Background: Use #FAFAFA (Off-white) as the main page background to avoid sterile clinical white.
Text: Never use pure black (#000000). Use #1A1A1A for primary text.
Accents: Use Gold (#D4AF37) sparingy - only for 'Add to Cart' buttons or active states.
Borders: Ultra-thin (1px) borders in #E5E5E5 for product cards.
FORBIDDEN: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Solid luxury tones only.

layout_strategy.grid_system: The Bento Grid (Mode A) for Collections
rules: Hero Section: Full viewport height (100vh) or min-h-[80vh].
Product Grid: Asymmetrical masonry or strict 4-column grid with generous gaps.
Mobile First: Stack all grids to 1 column on mobile.
Images: All product images must have an aspect ratio of 3:4 (Portrait).

buttons.style: Sharp edges or minimal rounded-sm (2px). No pill shapes.
buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-xs py-4 px-8
buttons.secondary: border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-xs py-4 px-8

cards.style: Minimalist. No shadows by default. Image dominates.
cards.hover: Scale image 1.05 on hover (overflow hidden). Fade in 'Quick View' button.

navigation.rule: DO NOT use transparent background if content scrolls underneath. Always add blur or solid bg.

inputs.style: Underlined style (border-b) or minimal box with bg-transparent.

motion.hover: Micro-interactions on all clickable elements (scale, color shift, underline expansion).

textures.noise: Optional: subtle noise overlay at 2% opacity to add film grain texture.

accessibility: All interactive elements MUST have aria-labels.
Focus states MUST be visible (ring-2 ring-primary).

testing.rule: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (kebab-case).

admin_panel.style: Clean, data-dense but readable. Sidebar navigation. White cards on gray background.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text or buttons.
Do not use 'Inter' font for headings.
Do not use standard blue/purple links.
Forms must use Shadcn components (Input, Select, Checkbox) tailored to the brand style.
